## Knowledge change

- Entry IDs:
- Type: add / update / supersede
- Source or evidence:
- Classification:
- Applies from / to:

## Review checklist

- [ ] `Totonoe Knowledge: Validate Repository` reports no errors
- [ ] Title, summary, body, and source agree
- [ ] Version range and `supersedes` are supported by evidence
- [ ] Superseded Entries remain in Git history and the repository
- [ ] No credential, customer data, internal host, or personal data is included unnecessarily
- [ ] Classification and source access match this repository's ACL
- [ ] Duplicate or conflicting Entries were considered
